mapper.select: select * from knowledge_base where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and course_id = #{courseId} and del_flag = '0'
select * from knowledge_base where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0' for update
select * from knowledge_base_version where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and del_flag = '0' order by version_no desc
select * from knowledge_base_version where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'
select * from knowledge_base_version where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0' for update
select * from knowledge_base_version where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and del_flag = '0' and status in ('draft', 'building', 'ready', 'failed') limit 1
select coalesce(max(version_no), 0) from knowledge_base_version where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_base_version_document( tenant_id, knowledge_base_version_id, document_id, document_version_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) select tenant_id, #{targetVersionId}, document_id, document_version_id, '0', #{username}, now(), remark from knowledge_base_version_document where knowledge_base_version_id = #{sourceVersionId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select s.*, d.title as document_title, v.version_no, v.original_filename, v.file_ext, v.status as version_status, v.module_id from knowledge_base_version_document s join course_document d on d.id = s.document_id join course_document_version v on v.id = s.document_version_id where s.knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and s.del_flag = '0' order by d.module_id nulls first, d.id

select id, tenant_id, course_id, module_id, document_id, version_no, original_filename, file_ext, status from course_document_version where course_id = #{courseId} and del_flag = '0' and status = 'parsed' and id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update knowledge_base_version_document set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from knowledge_base_version_document where knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update knowledge_base_version set status = #{status}, build_task_id = #{taskId}, build_error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'

update knowledge_base_version set status = 'ready', chunk_count = ( select count(1) from ai.knowledge_chunk where knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and status = 'active' ), embedding_index_version_id = ( select max(id) from ai.embedding_index_version where knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and status = 'ready' ), keyword_index_version_id = ( select max(id) from ai.keyword_index_version where knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and status = 'ready' ), build_error_message = null, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'
update knowledge_base_version set status = 'archived', update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'

update knowledge_base_version set status = 'published', published_at = now(), published_by = #{username}, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{versionId} and status = 'ready' and del_flag = '0'
update knowledge_base set current_version_id = #{versionId}, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select s.*, d.title as document_title, v.version_no, v.original_filename, v.file_ext, v.status as version_status, v.module_id from knowledge_base kb join knowledge_base_version kv on kv.id = kb.current_version_id and kv.status = 'published' and kv.del_flag = '0' join knowledge_base_version_document s on s.knowledge_base_version_id = kv.id and s.del_flag = '0' join course_document d on d.id = s.document_id join course_document_version v on v.id = s.document_version_id where kb.course_id = #{courseId} and kb.del_flag = '0' order by v.module_id nulls first, d.id

select count(1) from knowledge_base_version_document s join knowledge_base_version v on v.id = s.knowledge_base_version_id and v.del_flag = '0' where s.document_id = #{documentId} and s.del_flag = '0'
